EXPLANATION: The paper "Inductive Representation Learning on Large Graphs" is a well-known, peer-reviewed publication presented at NIPS 2017. The discrepancy regarding the author's name is a minor formatting difference (Will vs. William L. Hamilton).

FOUND_TITLE: Inductive Representation Learning on Large Graphs
